out_of_scope_note: eLife 'Author response' supplement (DOI suffix .sa2) — peer-review response companion to the primary research article, not the article itself. Abstract is a ~30-word eLife impact-statement boilerplate, well under the 100-useful-word threshold, and the document type is editorial/correspondence rather than empirical research. The primary research article (separate canonical_id) is the recommendable item; this companion record should not surface in researcher queues.
